## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow the [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)
- [ ] I ran `npm test` locally — all tests pass
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint` — no lint errors
- [ ] I added / updated tests for any new logic
- [ ] I updated relevant docs (README, ARCHITECTURE, WORKFLOWS) if needed

## CI pipelines affected

- [ ] `04-release` — fires on tag push only
- [ ] `05-deploy` — manual trigger only
